catalogue_metadata.citation: Carrabba, M.M. (2006). Wavenumber Standards for Raman Spectrometry. In Handbook of Vibrational Spectroscopy. John Wiley & Sons, Ltd. Table 3, 'ASTM / Toluene (T)-acetonitrile (A)' column.
catalogue_metadata.note: A single mixture standard whose lines come from two species (toluene and acetonitrile), used together for one calibration; species distinguishes which compound each line belongs to. uncertainty_cm1 stores the reported standard deviation, not an expanded/coverage-factor uncertainty.
